text.title: Content Atomization Engine Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Content Atomization Engine end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: identify-canonical
step.action: Pick ONE canonical asset; name url + version.

step.name: draft-transformations
step.action: Per channel: write transformation spec (length, hook, CTA).

step.name: distribute-and-log
step.action: Ship per channel; log timestamp + URL.
